mnemonics: F.E.W. Servers: More separate Functions means more Energy and Waste.
keyPoints: Increased number of separate functions often leads to server sprawl.
Each separate function can require its own dedicated hardware, increasing energy consumption.
Consolidation and virtualization are key strategies to mitigate this issue.
commonMistakes: Assuming more functions automatically lead to greater efficiency.
Overlooking the energy and resource overhead of managing numerous separate systems.
Focusing only on the function's primary task and ignoring its full lifecycle environmental impact.
